title: viola canina var. longipes
intro: Viola canina var. longipes, also known as the long-stemmed yellow violet, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the viola genus. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Viola canina var. longipes include relief from digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and skin irritations. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction, tincture, or salve for use in herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
